name: I have a pre-existing condition but work made my illness worse—can I still claim in Utah?
description: Yes, covers work aggravation of pre-existing issues.[4][5]

mainEntity.name: I have a pre-existing condition but work made my illness worse—can I still claim in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, covers work aggravation of pre-existing issues.[4][5]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, workers' comp covers aggravation of pre-existing conditions if work substantially contributed.[4][5] Employers pay for increased disability from work factors, with apportionment possible.[5] Key factors: (1) expert testimony on aggravation; (2) pre-work baseline; (3) work as prevailing factor. Obtain comparative medical opinions. File claim detailing changes. Legal help navigates apportionment disputes.
